response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in embedded systems, C programming for UNIX, Linux kernel modification, or network security technologies like MACsec, 802.1X, or switch firmware — all core requirements. Their background is overwhelmingly in web, mobile, and full-stack development with TypeScript/Node.js/Dlang, with no evidence of embedded firmware work or Japanese language proficiency.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with well-documented projects and workshops
Demonstrated ability to learn and apply diverse technologies quickly
concerns: No evidence of C programming for embedded UNIX systems or Linux kernel modification
No experience with LAN-switch security features (MACsec, 802.1X, tamper detection)
Japanese language proficiency not mentioned — critical requirement

key_factors.factor: No exposure to switch firmware or network security protocols
